key_themes: Expansion into enterprise, government, and property management
Bullish technical setups and trader interest on X
Rising demand for biometrics amid AI proliferation
Capital returns via dividends and buybacks
summary: Investor sentiment toward Clear Secure ($YOU) is positive, fueled by impressive 17% revenue growth to $901M in FY2025, 31% increase in memberships to 38 million, strong EBITDA margins, and successful diversification of its biometric identity platform beyond airports.[[1]](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/YOU/)[[1]](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/YOU/) Social media and investor discussions highlight constructive chart patterns (double bottoms, support holds) suggesting further upside, alongside the company's $440M+ FCF guidance for 2026, new partnerships (e.g. Snappt), FedRAMP progress, and analyst price target raises to $65. While consensus leans Hold with an average PT near current levels (~$53) due to premium valuation (P/E ~47), recent operational beats, TSA tailwinds, and AI-driven biometric relevance support optimism after 100%+ 1-year gains.[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/YOU/)[[3]](https://www.marketbeat.com/stocks/NYSE/YOU/forecast/)
sources: 20+ web news, earnings reports, and analyst notes from Yahoo Finance, company IR, MarketBeat, etc., 15+ relevant X posts primarily from traders and investors
